final_prompt.prompt:
Create a museum-catalogue-style Chinese annotated infographic featuring a photorealistic full-body depiction of traditional Chinese ethnic minority costume (中国少数民族服饰), formatted as a scholarly exhibit panel from a national history museum.

Style/medium: photorealistic editorial illustration blended with structured infographic layout; aesthetic of 国家博物馆 exhibit boards and 历史服饰图鉴 reference plates; restrained, archival, collectible
Composition: full vertical poster layout — top header zone, left structural-breakdown zone with leader-line annotations, upper-right material/craft swatch zone, mid-right pattern/color/symbolism zone, bottom dressing-sequence flowchart and summary zone; central subject is a photorealistic full-body standing figure in complete ethnic minority costume
Subject: a carefully chosen representative Chinese ethnic minority costume (自动选取最具代表性的少数民族服饰体系，如苗族、彝族、藏族、侗族等), rendered with accurate garment structure, layering, embroidery, silver ornaments, headdress, and footwear; all key components labeled with 简体中文 leader-line callouts pointing to: 头饰、领口、上衣、腰带、裙摆/裤装、绣片、银饰、鞋履 etc.
Scene/backdrop: warm off-white 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 paper-texture background with subtle aged-fiber grain; no photographic environment, no props beyond the figure
Lighting/mood: soft even diffused light from upper-left, no harsh shadows, museum-display neutral tone, scholarly and calm
Color palette: background anchored in warm 米白/绢纸白; costume colors determined by the chosen ethnic group's authentic palette (e.g. deep indigo, vermilion, silver, saffron); annotation text in dark ink brown or charcoal; accent rules in muted gold
Materials/textures: visible embroidery thread texture, woven fabric weave structure, hammered silver surface on ornaments, natural dye gradation on cloth — rendered with tactile realism
Text (verbatim): layout must include the following 简体中文 text blocks exactly as positioned —
  顶部主标题区: "中国少数民族服饰图鉴" 作为主标题，副标题为所选民族名称 + 服饰体系名，导语为2–3句简体中文说明该服饰的历史背景与文化地位；
  左侧拆解区: 简体中文引线标注各关键部件名称，每条标注附1–2句材质或工艺说明；
  右上材质区: 3–4个真实纹理小样方块，每块附简体中文说明（材质名、产地、工艺）；
  右中纹样色彩区: 主色板色块（附色彩文化含义简注）、2–3个纹样样本（附纹样名称与寓意）；
  底部流程图区: 穿着顺序步骤图（简体中文步骤标签）+ 核心特征总结3–5条（简体中文）
Constraints: all text must be 简体中文, legible, correctly written, no pinyin, no English, no garbled characters; layout must follow the exact five-zone structure described; figure must be full-body standing; infographic zones must be visually separated by fine rules or subtle wash; overall feel must be 专业、克制、可收藏 — not a poster, not a fashion photo, not anime
Avoid: 海报感, 影楼感, 电商感, 动漫感, cosplay感, English or pinyin text, garbled or fabricated characters, incorrect garment structure, over-decoration, dramatic lighting, gradient backgrounds, watermarks

Composition: full vertical poster layout — top header zone, left structural-breakdown zone with leader-line annotations, upper-right material/craft swatch zone, mid-right pattern/color/symbolism zone, bottom dressing-sequence flowchart and summary zone; central subject is a photorealistic full-body standing figure in complete ethnic minority costume
Subject: a carefully chosen representative Chinese ethnic minority costume (自动选取最具代表性的少数民族服饰体系，如苗族、彝族、藏族、侗族等), rendered with accurate garment structure, layering, embroidery, silver ornaments, headdress, and footwear; all key components labeled with 简体中文 leader-line callouts pointing to: 头饰、领口、上衣、腰带、裙摆/裤装、绣片、银饰、鞋履 etc.

Text (verbatim): layout must include the following 简体中文 text blocks exactly as positioned —
  顶部主标题区: "中国少数民族服饰图鉴" 作为主标题，副标题为所选民族名称 + 服饰体系名，导语为2–3句简体中文说明该服饰的历史背景与文化地位；
  左侧拆解区: 简体中文引线标注各关键部件名称，每条标注附1–2句材质或工艺说明；
  右上材质区: 3–4个真实纹理小样方块，每块附简体中文说明（材质名、产地、工艺）；
  右中纹样色彩区: 主色板色块（附色彩文化含义简注）、2–3个纹样样本（附纹样名称与寓意）；
  底部流程图区: 穿着顺序步骤图（简体中文步骤标签）+ 核心特征总结3–5条（简体中文）
Constraints: all text must be 简体中文, legible, correctly written, no pinyin, no English, no garbled characters; layout must follow the exact five-zone structure described; figure must be full-body standing; infographic zones must be visually separated by fine rules or subtle wash; overall feel must be 专业、克制、可收藏 — not a poster, not a fashion photo, not anime
Avoid: 海报感, 影楼感, 电商感, 动漫感, cosplay感, English or pinyin text, garbled or fabricated characters, incorrect garment structure, over-decoration, dramatic lighting, gradient backgrounds, watermarks", "size": "1008x1792", "quality": "medium", "n": 1, "output_format": "png"}
